Auth.//: Entra External ID JWT bearer settings. Fill these in for non-dev hosting.

Graph.//: Connect Outlook (calendar import). Register a multi-tenant Entra app with delegated Calendars.Read + offline_access. Put ClientSecret in user-secrets, NOT here.
Graph.Scopes: openid profile email offline_access User.Read Calendars.Read

WebApp.//: Where the OAuth callback redirects the browser back to (the Blazor client).
